untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) 'extended trend establishment' with configurable min_trend_bars threshold, (2) climax bar identification (extreme high/low with volume spike), (3) prior consolidation/range period detection with min_range_duration_bars threshold. These composite pattern-recognition conditions cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators and binary operators. The signal needs multi-bar pattern analysis and contextual memory of prior price action structure that exceeds the scope of single-bar indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using ADX>25 (trend confirmation), volume spike detection (hvol_20), and climactic bar proxies (prev_high/low breaks). However, the core logic—distinguishing climactic breakouts FROM ranges (avoid) versus climaxes AFTER trends (trade)—requires pattern-state tracking impossible with allowed operators. A full implementation would need: (1) lookback window analysis for trend duration, (2) range identification algorithm, (3) climax bar detection (body size, wick properties, volume confirmation). Parameters min_trend_bars, min_range_duration_bars, and volume_spike_threshold_percentile are untranslatable to fixed thresholds without domain expertise.
